tasks.subject: Hard audit of founding spec + master plan index + Plan 01
tasks.notes: Architectural audit, NOT business. Brief at 00_META/proposals/2026-05-13_audit-request.md. Two methodologies (risk-auditor agent or fresh adversarial Claude session). Output: 00_META/proposals/2026-05-14_audit-report.md with GREEN/YELLOW(+amendments)/RED verdict. Gates t-presentation and t-plan-01.

tasks.subject: Build Aurora-styled HTML presentation of all decisions
tasks.notes: User-friendly visualization of the design for JP-readability. Same pedagogical voice as the 2026-05-12 JP v3 cheatsheet (analogies: caja fuerte, cuaderno de bitácora, etc.). Lands at 00_META/proposals/2026-05-XX_nexostrat-presentation.html. ~2-3 hours focused build.

tasks.subject: Execute Plan 01 — Repository Foundation
tasks.notes: Full plan at 00_META/plans/2026-05-13_plan-01-repository-foundation.md. 28 tasks, ~120 steps. Execute via superpowers:subagent-driven-development (fresh subagent per task + two-stage review). Decision points for execution start: standby host (HP-standby YAML profile), GitHub username+repo (recommend nexostrat private), age key passphrase (recommend yes). Tag v0.1-foundation on completion.

tasks.subject: Write Plan 02 (Documentation System) in full task detail via writing-plans skill
tasks.notes: Master-index header in 00_META/plans/README.md. ~3 days to execute after writing. Includes drafting all 15 new ADRs (021-035) as 00_GOVERNANCE/adr/ files.
